name: Omni Downloader IMAP to LLM to Worker

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ model: 'REPLACE_WITH_MODEL', temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You identify the single best downloadable media URL for newsroom ingest. Prefer the main article video, not ads, analytics, thumbnails, subtitles, or unrelated embeds. Return JSON only with this schema: {"selected_url":"string","confidence":0.0,"reason":"string"}. If no reliable media URL exists, return {"selected_url":"","confidence":0.0,"reason":"no reliable media url found"}.' }, { role: 'user', content: `Select the best direct or player media URL from this article context.\n\n${JSON.stringify($json.extracted_context)}` } ] }) }}
